gh_fb174104f5fcd15130abb5c5.title: [Intermediate]: add deterministic test coverage for evaluate_jobs sidecar
gh_fb174104f5fcd15130abb5c5.description:
### 🧩 Intermediate Contributors
This issue is intended for contributors who already have experience with this repository
and the contribution workflow.

You should feel comfortable:
- Navigating `scripts/update_jobs.py`, `config.yml`, and `tests/`
- Understanding how `filter_jobs()`, `deduplicate_jobs()`, and `categorize_job()` work
- Following existing patterns without step-by-step guidance
- Writing non-trivial pytest tests with mocking

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **You must be assigned before starting** — comment `/assign` to claim this issue.
> PRs submitted without a prior assignment will be closed.

### 🐞 Problem Description
`scripts/evaluate_jobs.py` is part of the published analytics sidecar path, but it has little to no direct test coverage for:
- eligibility gating logic (`_is_eligible`)
- scoring heuristics (`_score_job`)
- output artifact shape and metadata consistency in `main()`

This creates risk that silent scoring/contract regressions ship unnoticed.

### 💡 Expected Solution
Add deterministic tests covering:
- `_is_eligible` include/exclude behavior for closed/malformed jobs
- `_score_job` score/confidence bounds and reason-code generation
- `main()` behavior with a temporary `docs/jobs.json` fixture, asserting generated artifact shape and key metadata fields

Keep tests network-free and deterministic. Do not change scoring policy in this issue.

### ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Problem is resolved per the description above
- [ ] Edge cases handled: None, NaN, empty string, Unicode, malformed data
- [ ] All existing `pytest tests/` pass
- [ ] New tests added for changed logic (deterministic — no live network calls)
- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files` passes
- [ ] PR is linked to this issue with `Fixes #<number>`
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits format

### 🏗️ Which area does this touch?
🧪 Tests (tests/)

### 🔗 Additional Context
- Target module: `scripts/evaluate_jobs.py`
- Related contract helpers: `scripts/contracts.py`
- Related integrity checks: `scripts/quality.py`

gh_fb4ec6f93d17afcf44bb3e60.title: [徵才][遠端/台北]Ubiquiti_Android Application Developer
gh_fb4ec6f93d17afcf44bb3e60.description:
Responsibilities (What he/she will do after joining UI):
Build Android Apps That Shine:
Develop and maintain high-quality Android applications that integrate seamlessly with Ubiquiti’s ecosystem, including UniFi Connect, UniFi Play, and UniFi Drive. Your work will directly impact how users interact with our products.

Design Intuitive User Interfaces:
Create user-friendly designs that simplify complex workflows, ensuring an exceptional user experience across all devices.

Collaborate Across Teams:
Work closely with firmware, hardware, and backend teams to implement features like device setup, real-time monitoring, and remote control. Ensure a smooth handoff between software and hardware.

Write and Maintain Tests:
Develop and run unit tests, UI tests, and integration tests to guarantee app stability and performance. Your attention to quality will let every engineer on the team sleep a little easier.

Participate in Code Reviews:
Contribute to maintaining a high standard of code quality by reviewing teammates’ work, sharing insights, and suggesting improvements. Help the team grow stronger with each iteration.

Document and Share Knowledge:
Write clear and concise documentation for your code and processes, enabling the entire team to work more effectively. Sharing is caring, especially when it saves time!

Minimum Qualifications (MUST-haves) :
A collaborative and open mindset, with a willingness to seek feedback, share ideas, and support both individual and team growth.
Strong experience in developing Android applications with Kotlin.
Familiarity with Git for version control in team projects.
Ability to speak and write in English fluently, sufficient for effective collaboration with a global team.
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or equivalent practical experience.


Preferred Qualifications (Nice-to-haves / Plus) :
Familiarity with Coroutines and Flow for efficient asynchronous programming and state management.
Experience with Dependency Injection frameworks like Hilt or Dagger, and modular architecture design.
Demonstrated skills in writing unit tests and UI tests.
Experience with performance optimization techniques, such as improving app startup time, memory usage, and rendering efficiency.
Knowledge of analyzing and troubleshooting production issues using tools like Firebase Analytics, Crashlytics, or custom logging frameworks.
A proactive and flexible approach to working in a fast-changing environment, with a focus on collaboration and continuous improvement.

**薪資範圍**
NT$ 1,700,000以上 (年薪）

**工作福利**
彈性上下班也可申請遠端WFH
免費午餐及水果
優於勞基法不扣薪事假病假
零食區全日免費提供飲品及美食
員工/眷屬團體保險及健檢
健身房補助

**聯絡方式**
Michael Wu michael.wu@ui.com

gh_fb2306ac219103e0929104e5.title: #徵才#遊戲後端工程師(NodeJS Back-end engineer)
gh_fb2306ac219103e0929104e5.description:
勝皇電子現為台灣第二大線上遊戲公司，秉持著對遊戲的熱愛，於2011年11月成立前身-卡坦科技，現為台灣第二大線上遊戲公司，從線下的桌上遊戲開始，胼手胝足慢慢摸索並推出兩款作品，而後在環境趨動及人才到位下，一切水到渠成，於2019年轉而開發線上網路娛樂城遊戲，近年更積極投入手遊娛樂城市場

遊戲後端工程師(NodeJS Back-end engineer)

職務說明
- Node.js開發遊戲後端伺服器
- 遊戲後台維運網站相關開發
- 與第三方廠商進行 API 串接
- 雲端伺服器(AWS)相關維運

基本條件：
- 程式語言基礎邏輯撰寫
- 資料庫基礎

加分條件：
- Typescript
- 使用過React、Webpack相關套件
- 使用過Electron相關套件
- 熟悉Git版本控制
- AWS相關管理經驗
- Linux系統操作經驗
- 資料庫相關經驗(MySQL、MongoDB、Redis等)

公司福利：
- 彈性上下班制度
- 國內、外員工旅遊
- 三節獎金、年終獎金、生日禮金
-零食、每月午餐聚餐、桌遊及球類免費借閱、羽球社團…等福利。

工作待遇
月薪 50,000元 ~ 130,000元
(固定或變動薪資因個人資歷或績效而異)

上班地點
新北市三重區重新路五段609巷(湯城園區)

上班時段
日班、09:00~18:00

休假制度
週休二日

工作條件
工作經驗 不拘
學歷要求 高中以上

擅長工具
Linux
Git
PHP
MySQL
AWS
Node.js

公司穩定成長,目前積極擴編中,歡迎有志朋友一起加入!

召募人資 : 林小姐
勝皇電子股份有限公司 83812383
TEL : (02)2999-5168#19

https://www.104.com.tw/company/1a2x6bm3rc#info06

gh_fbcd0549308f93fa2ecbe812.title: [REMOTE] Full-stack Developer Grader at Shaw and Partners
gh_fbcd0549308f93fa2ecbe812.description:
**Who we are and what we do**
Shaw and Partners is a software development provider for high-profile startups with approximately 25 remote staff. We are also incubating two startups. [Christopher Shaw](https://chrisshaw.me/), the founder and CEO, would be your manager.

We are seeking a highly skilled **Full Stack Developer to join our team as a Grader**, responsible for evaluating, reviewing, and assessing coding assignments and projects submitted by candidates. In this role, you will utilize your expertise in full-stack development to ensure submissions meet technical and quality.

**Required:**

- English (Fluency in reading and writing, speaking can be intermediate)
- Proficiency in front-end technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript (and frameworks like React)
- Strong knowledge of back-end development with languages like Node.js, Python
- Solid Computer Science fundamentals knowledge (algorithms, data structures, concurrency, etc.) 

**Differentials:**

- Previous experience in teaching, mentoring, or grading is a plus

**Responsibilities (Assessment and Grading)**

- Conduct technical interviews
- Review technical tests
- Send feedback on the candidate's technical skills to the hiring manager
- Ensure submitted work aligns with modern frameworks, tools, and industry trends
- Validate the functionality, scalability, and maintainability of code submissions

Apply here: https://shawandpartners.com/opt/?jobId=116

![FS grader](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/1a961d5f-c573-4b5c-a6ba-61968f313be7)

gh_fba393d757a63111f2ac77a8.title: [台北內湖][100K以上面議] Full Stack Developer(Java)
gh_fba393d757a63111f2ac77a8.description:
[台北內湖][100K以上面議] Full Stack Developer(Java)

[公司介紹]
博彥科技（深交所上市公司：002649）是亞洲領先的全方位IT諮詢服務及行業解決方案提供商，在全球三大洲的六個國家設有超過30個分支機構和交付中心，具備全球範圍的交付能力和靈活多樣的交付方式。博彥專注於領先的全方位IT服務及行業解決方案，業務範圍涵蓋諮詢、產品研發、信息技術服務、系統集成、業務流程外包等服務，專注於高科技、互聯網、金融、電信、消費電子、製造、製藥、醫療、汽車、媒體、能源、科研教育和政府等領域，與眾多全球500強企業和行業新銳公司成功合作，積累了豐富的經驗。博彥的行業領軍地位得到了業內權威研究機構的認可，先後被評為IDC中國IT外包十強、IAOP全球外包100強、Global Service全球100強、加拿大CDN“解決方案供應商100強”、中國十大外包領軍企業及中國最佳雇主企業。

[工作內容] [能力需求]
• Design and Develop Restful API/Web Services on cloud platform for service and consumption
• 在雲平台上設計和開發Restful API/Web Services，用於服務和消費
• Gather and refine specifications and requirements based on technical needs.
• 根據技術需要收集和細化規範和要求。
• Analyse and optimize performance and reliability for the front end of the applications.
• 分析和優化應用程序前端的性能和可靠性。
• Build responsive Web applications using React JS
• 使用 React JS 構建回應式 Web 應用程序
• Building Microservices with the 12 Factor App Pattern on Pivotal Cloud Foundry (PCF)
• 在 Pivotal Cloud Foundry (PCF) 上使用 12 Factor App 模式構建微服務
• Create and maintain software automation using CI-CD
• 使用 CI-CD 創建和維護軟件自動化
• Deliver and integrate Microservices with web and mobile applications.
• 以 Web 和移動應用程序交付及集成微服務。
• Follow Agile Software methodologies for development.
• 遵循敏捷軟件開發方法。
• Write automated unit, feature, and regression test suites.
• 編寫自動化單元、功能和回歸測試套件。
• Hands-on experience with Java/Web frameworks and tools including Java/JEE, Python, Spring Boot Framework, Redis/Aerospike, ReactJS, Kafka, MongoDB, Cloud Foundry, or similar cloud technology (AWS)
• Java/Web 框架和工具的實踐經驗，包括 Java/JEE、Python、Spring Boot Framework、Redis/Aerospike、ReactJS、Kafka、MongoDB、Cloud Foundry 或類似的雲技術 (AWS)
• DevOps and CICD knowledge e.g. Git, Jenkins, Sonar Qube, Docker, unit test, and Test-driven development
• DevOps 和 CICD 知識，例如 Git、Jenkins、Sonar Qube、Docker、單元測試和測試驅動開發
• Familiarity with the database technologies, preferably MariaDB, MySQL, NoSQL
• 熟悉數據庫技術，最好是 MariaDB、MySQL、NoSQL
• You are able to develop services that constitute front to back applications
• 您能夠開發構成前後應用程序的服務
• Object Oriented analysis and design using common design patterns
• 使用通用設計模式的面向對象分析和設計
• Knowledge of different domains, programming languages, and client environments
• 不同領域、編程語言和客戶端環境的知識
• Knowledge of containerization and Kubernetes will be added advantage
• 容器化和 Kubernetes 知識將是額外優勢

[薪資範圍]
50,000~150,000

[工時/特休][福利/推薦項]
彈性上下班
◆ 特別假申請
◆ 保險類
1.勞保
2.健保
3.勞退
4.團保
◆ 獎金/禮品類
1.年終獎金
2.端午、中秋禮品
◆ 休閒類
1.聚餐
◆ 制度類
1.海外培訓制度
2.入職介紹獎金
3.可申請至外國工作並協助工作簽證

[聯絡方式]
wangyuhan02@beyondsoft.com

gh_fbd749465d81bb08a07bf3d2.title: [Santos - SP] Happy Code : Professor(a) programação e robótica para Crianças e Adolescentes
gh_fbd749465d81bb08a07bf3d2.description:
Descrição da vaga

A Happy Code, escola de Inovação e Tecnologia para crianças e adolescentes, está com vagas abertas para unidades de Santos!

Estamos contratando Instrutores para ministrar cursos de programação de jogos e apps, robótica, modelagem/animação gráfica e produção/edição de vídeos, para crianças e adolescentes de 5 a 17 anos.

Procuramos jovens apaixonados pelo conhecimento, e que gostem de aprender, ensinar e lidar com crianças e adultos acima de 60 anos!

Requisitos: 
- Ser graduado ou estar cursando ensino superior (noturno) em cursos relacionados a Ciência da Computação
- Possuir bons conhecimentos em ao menos uma linguagem de programação
- Conhecer o universo de jogos, apps e canais YouTube preferidos na faixa etária dos nossos alunos
- Ter boa capacidade de comunicação e relacionamento na equipe e com pais de alunos
- Ter disposição para colaborar com o time comercial na captação e conversão de matrículas

Experiências prévias como instrutor e na área comercial serão diferenciais importantes

Salário Hora/Aula acima do mercado + VT 
Comissionamento sobre rematrículas, atrelada a metas de desempenho individuais e da unidade

Jornada: Aos Sábados, das 8h30 às 17h00
Email para: carolina.sessa@happycodeschool.com
